en: In the third year of the reign of Jehoiakim king of Judah, Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came to Jerusalem and besieged it.
zh: 猶大王約雅敬在位第三年，巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒來到耶路撒冷，把城圍困。

en: And the Lord gave Jehoiakim king of Judah into his hand, with some of the vessels of the house of God. And he brought them to the land of Shinar, to the house of his god, and placed the vessels in the treasury of his god.
zh: 主把猶大王約雅敬和神殿中的一部分器物交在尼布甲尼撒手裡，他就把這些器物帶到示拿地的神廟那裡，存放在廟中的寶庫裡。

en: Then the king commanded Ashpenaz, his chief eunuch, to bring some of the people of Israel, both of the royal family and of the nobility,
zh: 王吩咐他的太監長亞施毘拿說：“你要從以色列人中，把一些王室的後裔和貴族帶進來；

en: youths without blemish, of good appearance and skillful in all wisdom, endowed with knowledge, understanding learning, and competent to stand in the king's palace, and to teach them the literature and language of the Chaldeans.
zh: 這些年輕人必須沒有殘疾、英俊、足智多才、有高度學習能力、明察事理，而且他們必須有能力可以在王宮裡工作。你要教他們學習迦勒底的文學和語言。”

en: The king assigned them a daily portion of the food that the king ate, and of the wine that he drank. They were to be educated for three years, and at the end of that time they were to stand before the king.
zh: 王指定每日給他們一份御用的佳餚美酒；又教養他們三年。期滿以後，他們就侍立在王面前。

en: Among these were Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael, and Azariah of the tribe of Judah.
zh: 他們中間有猶大人但以理、哈拿尼雅、米沙利、亞撒利雅。

en: And the chief of the eunuchs gave them names: Daniel he called Belteshazzar, Hananiah he called Shadrach, Mishael he called Meshach, and Azariah he called Abednego.
zh: 太監長給他們起了新的名字，稱但以理為伯提沙撒，哈拿尼雅為沙得拉，米沙利為米煞，亞撒利雅為亞伯尼歌。

en: But Daniel resolved that he would not defile himself with the king's food, or with the wine that he drank. Therefore he asked the chief of the eunuchs to allow him not to defile himself.
zh: 但以理決心不讓御用的佳餚美酒玷污自己，所以求太監長幫助他，使他不用玷污自己。

en: And God gave Daniel favor and compassion in the sight of the chief of the eunuchs,
zh: 於是 神使但以理在太監長面前得著恩惠和同情。

en: and the chief of the eunuchs said to Daniel, "I fear my lord the king, who assigned your food and your drink; for why should he see that you were in worse condition than the youths who are of your own age? So you would endanger my head with the king."
zh: 只是太監長對但以理說：“我懼怕我主我王，他已指定了你們應用的飲食；如果他見到你們的面色比你們同歲的年輕人憔悴難看，你們就使我的頭在王面前保不住了。”

en: Then Daniel said to the steward whom the chief of the eunuchs had assigned over Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael, and Azariah,
zh: 後來但以理對太監長分派看管但以理、哈拿尼雅、米沙利、亞撒利雅的人說：

en: "Test your servants for ten days; let us be given vegetables to eat and water to drink.
zh: “請你試試僕人十天，容我們只吃素菜、喝清水。

en: Then let our appearance and the appearance of the youths who eat the king's food be observed by you, and deal with your servants according to what you see."
zh: 然後，請你觀察我們的容貌，和那些享用王的佳餚的年輕人的容貌，就照著你觀察的結果，待你的僕人吧！”

en: So he listened to them in this matter, and tested them for ten days.
zh: 看管他們的人就允准他們的這個要求，試試他們十天。

en: At the end of ten days it was seen that they were better in appearance and fatter in flesh than all the youths who ate the king's food.
zh: 過了十天，見他們的容貌比所有享用王的佳餚的年輕人，更加俊美健壯。

en: So the steward took away their food and the wine they were to drink, and gave them vegetables.
zh: 看管他們的人就撤去指定給他們享用的佳餚美酒，讓他們吃素菜。

en: As for these four youths, God gave them learning and skill in all literature and wisdom, and Daniel had understanding in all visions and dreams.
zh: 這四個年輕人在各種文字和學問上， 神都賜他們知識和聰明；但以理並且能明白一切異象和異夢。

en: At the end of the time, when the king had commanded that they should be brought in, the chief of the eunuchs brought them in before Nebuchadnezzar.
zh: 到了王吩咐帶所有年輕人進宮的日子，太監長就領他們到尼布甲尼撒王面前。

en: And the king spoke with them, and among all of them none was found like Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael, and Azariah. Therefore they stood before the king.
zh: 王和他們談話，發現他們所有的人中，沒有一個比得上但以理、哈拿尼雅、米沙利、亞撒利雅的；他們四人就侍立在王面前。

en: And in every matter of wisdom and understanding about which the king inquired of them, he found them ten times better than all the magicians and enchanters that were in all his kingdom.
zh: 王考問他們一切智慧和聰明的事，就發現他們比全國所有的術士和用法術的更勝十倍。

en: And Daniel was there until the first year of King Cyrus.
zh: 直到古列王元年，但以理還在。
